description_long: This is a large, industrial-style shelving unit constructed primarily from metal, featuring a robust rectangular frame and three spacious horizontal shelves. The shelves are composed of evenly spaced slats, allowing for airflow and visibility through each level. The structure is supported by eight vertical legs, providing stability and elevating the shelves above the ground. The central section of the unit is divided by a vertical support, creating two symmetrical bays on each shelf. The overall design is open, with no doors, panels, or enclosed compartments, making it suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or warehouses. The finish is dark and glossy, giving the unit a modern, utilitarian appearance.
description: A large, open, metal shelving unit with three slatted shelves and a sturdy, glossy black frame. It features two symmetrical bays per shelf and is elevated on eight legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three slatted shelves, and central vertical divider creating two bays per shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth, slatted shelf design, and the open, unobstructed structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with visible slatted shelves and central divider.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and open slatted construction.
